text:
First, note that time zones as we know them did not exist in 1626.  
But if we apply modern time zone definitions retroactively:  
Asia/Kolkata is UTC+5:30.  
US/Mountain is UTC-7 (or UTC-6 during DST, but DST not in effect in December).  

Time difference = UTC-7 minus UTC+5:30 = -12 hours 30 minutes.  

7:00 (Kolkata) − 12h30m = previous day 18:30 (Mountain).  

Date in Mountain time: December 13, 1626, 18:30.  

FINAL_ANSWER: 1626-12-13 18:30
